name: Philadelphia Sticky Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the dough cycle.
2. Roll out the dough into a rectangle about 1/4 to 1/8 inch thick, depending on how many and how large you want to make them.
3. Take 1 tablespoon of softened butter and spread it around, leaving a 1/4-inch edge.
4. Sprinkle cinnamon all around as much as desired, then sprinkle 1/2 cup brown sugar.
5. Optionally, add an equal amount of chopped nuts and raisins.
6. Roll up the dough into a log and cut off about 1 1/2 to 2 inches.
7. Place in a lightly greased pan and let rise for 45 minutes.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 to 20 minutes.
9. When slightly cooled, drizzle with a glaze made of powdered sugar, butter, vanilla extract, and milk.
10. Notes: Place the pecans in the bottom of the pan and sprinkle with brown sugar. Put the rolls on top of this mixture and bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 20 minutes. Watch carefully as ovens vary. Cool for exactly 5 minutes before turning out. You can add more glaze, but it is optional.
